hero.title: Freshly Baked Every Day
hero.subtitle: Discover the art of traditional baking with our artisanal bread and pastries.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We offer you the best food products with high quality and an unforgettable shopping experience.
about.story_desc: Our journey started from a passion for serving authentic food with fresh, carefully selected ingredients. We believe that quality is not just a word, but a commitment we apply in every product we offer to our customers.
about.value1_desc: We guarantee fresh ingredients and strict health standards.
about.value2_desc: Traditional recipes prepared by culinary experts.
about.value3_desc: Secure packaging and fast delivery ensure the product arrives in the best condition.

shop.title: Our Bakery
shop.no_products_desc: Maybe it's out of the oven, or the selected filters don't match any product.

footer.description: Baked with love, for your happy moments. A taste that combines authenticity and high quality.

contact.subtitle: We are happy to connect with you. We are here to answer all your inquiries and fulfill your requests.

cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: This website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

faq.title: How can we help you?
faq.subtitle: Here are answers to the most frequently asked questions

questions.q1_title: How can I modify or cancel my order?
questions.q1_ans: You can modify or cancel your order within 15 mins of confirmation via the Orders page.
questions.q2_ans: We bake fresh! Delivery usually takes 30 to 60 minutes.
questions.q3_ans: We accept Credit Cards, Mada, Apple Pay, and Cash on Delivery.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your data security is our top priority

sections.sec1_body: We collect information you provide when registering or purchasing, such as name, phone number, and address.
sections.sec2_body: This data is used to successfully deliver your orders and improve our services and your browsing experience.
sections.sec3_body: We do not sell or share your data with any third parties except delivery partners to fulfill your order.
sections.sec4_body: We follow the highest security and encryption standards to protect your personal information from unauthorized access.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully to ensure a great experience

sections.sec1_body: By using our site, you agree to be bound by the following terms outlined here.
sections.sec2_body: We reserve the right to modify product prices. Fulfilling orders depends on the availability of fresh ingredients.
sections.sec3_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account details and password.
sections.sec4_body: All content and images on the site are owned by us and may not be used for commercial purposes.
